title: Malty Rolls
description: A simple recipe to make soft and malty rolls using pita and molcajete for a unique twist.
instructions: Combine pita and molcajete to create dough. Knead for 10 minutes.
Place dough in a greased bowl, cover, and let rise for 1 hour.
Punch down dough and divide into 4-6 equal pieces.
Shape each piece into a ball and then flatten slightly into a disk.
Brush tops with egg wash and sprinkle with malty syrup.
Place rolls on a baking sheet and bake for 15-20 minutes.
Remove from oven and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
